response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced engineer (15+ years) with strong web, backend, and some systems-level background, but his profile does not match this C++-centric industrial role. Professional C++ exposure is limited to a short stint at National Instruments (~7 months in 2014–2015) and a thesis project; his systems work since then has been in DLang and Node.js/TypeScript. There is no evidence of MQTT, message brokers at industrial scale, IEC 62443/SDL practices, or industrial-automation protocol experience, all of which are core to the position.
strengths: Deep low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, caching) at Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, mentoring and workshops
Broad full-stack and event-driven platform experience, including Kubernetes deployments
concerns: Minimal professional C++/STL experience; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang
No industrial cybersecurity, SDL, or IEC 62443 exposure evident
No MQTT, OPC UA, Modbus, or other industrial protocol experience mentioned
